description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a close-reports stage and two jobs that extend the .run template. Add a close-old-triage-reports job in the close-reports stage that runs only when the $TRIAGE_CLOSE_OLD_TRIAGE_REPORTS variable is true and sets the variable TRIAGE_POLICY_FILE to policies/stages/close-reports/close-old-triage-reports.yml. Add a close-reports-resources-moved-to-next-milestone job in the same stage that runs only when $TRIAGE_CLOSE_REPORTS_RESOURCES_MOVED_TO_NEXT_MILESTONE is true and sets TRIAGE_POLICY_FILE to policies/stages/close-reports/close-reports-resources-moved-to-next-milestone.yml. Both jobs inherit the script defined in the .run template.
